steps.title: Spot the contrast
steps.content: The first sentence emphasizes the material's flexibility; the second introduces the weight's limiting effect. These ideas work against each other — the passage needs a word that signals this contradiction.

steps.title: Apply the contrast signal
steps.content: However directly marks the contradiction between the material's positive property (flexibility) and the suit's negative property (added weight limiting mobility). The other choices fail because For this reason signals a consequence (not present here), Firstly suggests a series (only two points), and In other words suggests rephrasing (the sentences express opposite ideas, not the same idea restated). That matches choice C — C is correct.
